Assert that a flow instance's current context satisfies the data-flow invariant.

Returns the value of the available record component.
availableAfter(String) - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.PipelineDataFlow
Types available in context after a given step completes.
availableAt(S) - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.DataFlowGraph
Data types available in context when the flow reaches the given state.
availableData() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowInstance
Data types currently available in context (based on data-flow graph for current state).
availableTypes() - Method in exception class org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowException
Types that were available in context when the error occurred.

dataFlowGraph() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowDefinition
Data-flow graph derived from requires/produces declarations.
DataFlowGraph<S> - Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Bipartite graph of data types and processors/guards derived from a FlowDefinition.
DataFlowGraph.DiffResult - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Diff two data-flow graphs.
DataFlowGraph.ExplainResult<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Result of DataFlowGraph.explain(Enum) / DataFlowGraph.explain(Enum, Class).
DataFlowGraph.Impact<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Impact analysis: all producers and consumers of a given type.
DataFlowGraph.Lifetime<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Data lifetime: which states a type is first produced and last consumed.
DataFlowGraph.MissingInfo<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Info about a missing type at a state.
DataFlowGraph.NodeInfo<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Info about a processor/guard that produces or consumes a type.
DataFlowGraph.ProducerInfo<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Info about a producer: its name and the state where it produces the type.
deadData() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.DataFlowGraph
Types that are produced but never required by any downstream processor/guard.
deadData() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.PipelineDataFlow
Types produced but never required by any downstream step.

Returns the value of the deadDataNodes record component.

Last error message (set when a processor throws and error transition fires).

Get the lifetime of a type across the flow.
Lifetime(S, S) - Constructor for record class org.unlaxer.tramli.DataFlowGraph.Lifetime
Creates an instance of a Lifetime record class.
load(String) - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.InMemoryFlowStore
Load a flow by ID regardless of completion status (read-only access).
loadForUpdate(String, FlowDefinition<S>) - Method in interface org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowStore
 
loadForUpdate(String, FlowDefinition<S>) - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.InMemoryFlowStore
 
LogEntry - Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Log entry records for tramli's pluggable logger API.
LogEntry.Error - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Emitted when a processor throws or strictMode detects a produces violation.
LogEntry.GuardResult - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Emitted when a guard validates (accepted, rejected, or expired).
LogEntry.State - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Emitted when context.put() is called (opt-in via setStateLogger).
LogEntry.Transition - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Emitted on each state transition.

org.unlaxer.tramli - package org.unlaxer.tramli
 

P

parallelismHints() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.DataFlowGraph
Parallelism hints: pairs of processors at the same state that have no data dependency (neither requires the other's produces).
parentState() - Method in record class org.unlaxer.tramli.RenderableGraph.SubFlowBlock
Returns the value of the parentState record component.
pipeline(String) - Static method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.Tramli
Start defining a new pipeline — sequential step chain with build-time requires/produces verification.
Pipeline - Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Build-time verified pipeline — sequential step chain with requires/produces contracts.
Pipeline.PipelineBuilder - Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
 
PipelineDataFlow - Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Lightweight data-flow analysis for Pipelines.
PipelineException - Exception Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Thrown when a pipeline step fails during execution.
PipelineException(String, List<String>, FlowContext, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class org.unlaxer.tramli.PipelineException
 
PipelineStep - Interface in org.unlaxer.tramli
A step in a Pipeline.

PRODUCES - Enum constant in enum class org.unlaxer.tramli.RenderableGraph.EdgeKind
 
pruningHints() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.DataFlowGraph
Context pruning hints: for each state, types that are available but not required by any processor/guard at that state or any state reachable from it.
put(Class<T>, T) - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowContext

Tramli - Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
Entry point for the tramli flow engine.

Returns the value of the transition record component.
Transition<S> - Record Class in org.unlaxer.tramli
A single transition in a flow definition.

W

waitingFor() - Method in class org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowInstance
Types required by the next external transition (including in active sub-flows).
